desc: a callable (non-statement, non-bare-identifier) handler under `.debounce`/`.throttle` — `@input.debounce(300)="$props.onPick"` → `onPick()` — is routed through applyThisPrefixing so the Angular debounce IIFE calls `this.onPick()` (Spike-012 R3-3); pre-fix NEW-2's angular this-prefix covered only the statement thunk, leaving the callable branch a free, un-`this`-qualified `onPick`
